data.title: 国际服巴哈姆特获奖特别礼物 2023
data.summary: [Bahamut Award Celebratory Appreciation Gift] We have been nominated as “Top Ten Popular Games of th
data.body:
[Bahamut Award Celebratory Appreciation Gift]

We have been nominated as “Top Ten Popular Games of the Year” in Bahamut, the most influential game website in Taiwan.

Please check your mailbox for special gifts of Pyroxene x600 and daily 120 AP for 7 days!

#BlueArchive![vPgy1yD8PpGhZ8Jwo8Z8HB0ZlnbkAGD9.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/vPgy1yD8PpGhZ8Jwo8Z8HB0ZlnbkAGD9.jpg)
